title: MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES - 211info
text: SPECTRUMS FAMILY SERVICES MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides mental health services that offer treatment options for autism, ADHD, anxiety, depression, coping skills, trauma, PTSD, peer relationships, and self-esteem issues. 8196 SW Hall Boulevard Suite 202 Beaverton, OR 97008 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Thursday 9am-6pm, Friday 9am-5pm Email (503) 567-1820 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 567-1820 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit the website for more information FEES: Accepts BCBS, PacificSource, MODA, Providence, and Aetna insurance DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Washington County Services: Autism Therapy Behavioral Learning Therapy Family Counseling Individual Counseling Individual Counseling * Disorders of Infancy/Childhood If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SPECTRUMS FAMILY SERVICES
